Friend, conservatives are being targeted.

And that's not just a talking point. It's not just a political statement. It's a reality for too many of us, including me.

This week the Wisconsin Department of Justice released a report that revealed unaccountable liberal bureaucrats at the Government Accountability Board hacked and collected my emails that go back as far back as 2009! Not just work emails, friend, but even personal emails with my daughter that included private medical information were collected as part of the John Doe witch hunts.

I know I'm not the only one. And I want everyone to hear about this terrible invasion of privacy.

I don’t want this to happen to anyone else, and I didn’t let it.

That’s why, even before I knew I was a target, I authored the law that eliminated the GAB. That’s also why I worked with Governor Walker and my legislative colleagues to reform our John Doe laws.

[**Can you chip in $5 so I can continue to spread the word on this?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3d1f9a3ed5d6449bbad8748aa6a5f6d4&_e=n9w4gaGgzECIDswshw5MI8ECRrtdmQHg-QtzsqTWHK3iBTwp1QGgs-gywOIDPci9GJN9DYfb8EygVjJzZEoBWkYXyTg0_zKH0hJjN6mAJoKuDIa8wYNy_KVXL0bPHD_OZq1xHdyopaOCQoDngksVwXpRIZHuCJgq7kUYUSn33m-1q3YOFud6e_neGFhqsI6Vt2gdJqt0YD4b-H3GYRsJDSl3BUZlyXrIGXBXw1VO_gHAuhITF9knRLDSFfoYDZrUIurSoonnnTruXkZXgf1PPez8uYa7yd8br1G45M8vOAXhWfkmoY6zN3kwvj3Az0ih-Yn-Mf82BxjWxZsbSX5bneauKsk4quSFmab7lIE8VZpT3WRCueVNdE8onwVDI62PLEvP43t4sMSdMvJtDyxUIWTv2QU4KHd-ePYTaVRYaChRR0LpiQUsS4ALx9Nvzayn)

Friend, I am horrified to learn how invasive this witch hunt was. It made its way into nearly every part of every major Wisconsin conservative’s life. Our private information was even stored in a file titled “opposition research” -- and you know they wanted to use whatever information they could to destroy us politically.

**No political motivation justifies this. **

We have to fight back and continue to spread the word on this major failure of government accountability. Our freedoms are at stake, and you can count on me to stand up for you. This week the Wisconsin Department of Justice released a report that revealed unaccountable liberal bureaucrats at the Government Accountability Board hacked and collected my emails that go back as far back as 2009! Not just work emails, friend, but even personal emails with my daughter that included private medical information were collected as part of the John Doe witch hunts. I know I'm not the only one. And I want everyone to hear about this terrible invasion of privacy. I don’t want this to happen to anyone else, and I didn’t let it. That’s why, even before I knew I was a target, I authored the law that eliminated the GAB. That’s also why I worked with Governor Walker and my legislative colleagues to reform our John Doe laws. Friend, I am horrified to learn how invasive this witch hunt was. It made its way into nearly every part of every major Wisconsin conservative’s life. Our private information was even stored in a file titled “opposition research” -- and you know they wanted to use whatever information they could to destroy us politically. No political motivation justifies this. We have to fight back and continue to spread the word on this major failure of government accountability. Our freedoms are at stake, and you can count on me to stand up for you. Thank you, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: The White House
subject: Let’s stay open for business
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=084056dc93d9a02d05817613003b783c0dcae555b49a943add2f2255284f66c9e9f394db79895cf529cf42860a53b7632c4daf28a8aeb694

Let’s stay open for business

Last night, Congress passed a short-term funding measure that keeps the federal government open while lawmakers continue to work on a long-term budget deal.

President Donald J. Trump lent his support to that effort yesterday, hosting both Democratic and Republican congressional leaders in the Oval Office. Although Congress is ultimately responsible for reaching a compromise that keeps the government open into next year, the White House understands its important leadership role in outlining what a lasting solution must achieve.

“This is a time of great opportunity in this country,” said Vice President Mike Pence. “We're seeing growth at home, but we have many challenges abroad.” Press Secretary Sarah Sanders underscored that some funding priorities must transcend politics, including the Departments of Defense and Veterans Affairs.

Yesterday’s meeting at the White House was an encouraging sign that leaders on both sides of the aisle agree. “We're all here as a very friendly, well-unified group,” said President Trump. “We hope that we're going to make some great progress for our country.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=084056dc93d9a02def1650bf5a6d9ac7de78e96d1c77ae5218bc2785b6666b1cf4fd070a7d8a4ba0373b3acc369d67c1ad7dd51855541590
Read the President and Vice President’s full remarks here.

‘We welcome this courageous decision’

America’s alliances are important: They drive our ability to both defend the homeland and eliminate threats long before they reach our shores. And of America’s allies, Israel is especially crucial, partnering with the U.S. to share intelligence and other assets that keep us safe from terrorism.

So it’s no small matter that leaders across Israel quickly expressed support for President Trump’s decision to recognize Jerusalem as the country’s capital. “We’re profoundly grateful,” Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said. “This decision reflects the President’s commitment to an ancient but enduring truth, to fulfilling his promises and to advancing peace.”

Danny Danon, Israel’s Permanent Representative to the United Nations, echoed those remarks. “We welcome this courageous decision,” he said. “President Trump righted a historic wrong.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=084056dc93d9a02d6d4a3d060187a1867ca6b7dd24120688e52193913dc5c11ecc718f3b47c14da20e27d97a7185baa85aae1c6f749f866d
Read more statements from Israeli and U.S. officials here.

WWJKD: What Would Jack Kemp do?

Vice President Pence joined the Jack Kemp Foundation’s annual award dinner last night, which honored Sen. Tim Scott (R-SC) as this year’s recipient.

“Jack Kemp was a hero of mine,” the Vice President said. And he explained why Kemp, the late Republican statesman, should loom large over this month’s tax reform proceedings on Capitol Hill.

“What Jack Kemp understood was that a tax code is more than just an accounting document,” he said. “He knew better than most that it's really a statement of the values of our nation.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=084056dc93d9a02d9a4b51b4c950289a8613ea3b3deab8d5a2e2d3b78370b9b151d460c0d3edca0efca59d8d9b895c76abbfc20b135d8fa9
Read Vice President Pence’s full remarks here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump signs a proclamation for National Pearl Harbor Remembrance Day 2017 | December 7, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will have lunch with Vice President Pence. Later, the President will meet with Secretary of Defense James Mattis in the Oval Office.

COMING UP

Tomorrow, the President will attend the opening celebration for the Mississippi Civil Rights Museum.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=084056dc93d9a02da621a6b748f20f23c90664560dbb99f20591592d38428ce7c700c5c3e50732600fd1fd31ca9e045784b95917980c10f3

Contact the White House |

name: Tim Kaine
subject: The way it is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek --

The Senate is the emergency brake on the train right now.

We have a volatile president doing real harm to our citizens and embarrassing our country on the world stage -- but sadly this isn't surprising. As the Democratic vice presidential nominee last year, I crossed this country telling voters about what we would see from a Trump presidency: division, instability, incompetence, selfishness, ethical lapses. Many others gave similar warnings. But millions chose to take a chance -- accepting promises of greatness from a candidate who himself showed no evidence of goodness.

So here we are. This is the way it is.

We all have a patriotic duty to engage and protect our country, our values and those we care about. And there's a role for everyone -- voting, running for office, peacefully protesting, writing public officials to ask them to step up.

My role is to help the Senate be a branch of government that can protect all we care about while also looking for opportunities to advance our nation -- whether or not our president wants to join in that effort. I work every day on health care for all, better education, defense and diplomacy, strengthening our economy. **And I would love your help as I run for re-election in 2018.**

**[Can I count on your support? Sign up here to become a member of our grassroots army.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=AyFW1%2F%2BA1SGuKz93%2BlPjEoPHW76QE4m0)**

When I ran in 2012, I faced the biggest onslaught of outside money of any Senate candidate in the country. The Koch Brothers, Karl Rove, the NRA, the U.S. Chamber of Commerce -- they all wanted to beat me.

But I won because I had 54,258 contributors willing to step up and fund my campaign. **And I need you again.**

My principal Republican opponent so far is an unabashedly pro-Confederate, anti-immigrant bully. He has enjoyed support from some of the most divisive figures in American politics. He sees that this divisive style got Donald Trump elected, and he wants to take it even further. He has vowed a "vicious, ruthless" campaign.

I want to win so I can keep serving Virginia and protecting our country. **But I also want to win so we can throw the politics of hatred and division in the trash can and continue the progressive arc Virginia has been on.**

I hope to build an even bigger movement of grassroots supporters in 2018 than I did in 2012. Our team has already received support from 35,921 contributors as we enter the final 11 months of the campaign, so we still have a ways to go.

**[Can I count on you to be a member of our grassroots army?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=StDJN13a7lgpQ9%2BxKlgPI4PHW76QE4m0)** The number of supporters I have matters more to me than any amount of money I raise. Could you forward this email to friends and encourage them to join us?

I need your support to maintain my principled fight for our best values.

I appreciate you.

Tim

name: Russ Feingold, LegitPAC
subject: I want to hear it from you
body:
[ Legit ]LegitPAC

Friend,

If you could ask your fellow Legit members to join you in supporting
one candidate for office anywhere in the United States, who would you
choose?

I’m reaching out to you because we want suggestions from members about
where to direct the next round of campaign resources to make the
biggest impact.

Do you know a candidate who’s deeply committed to voting rights?
Fighting for transparency? Facing an opponent who would be especially
toxic to legitimacy?

Tell us which candidate you think needs our support and why, and the
next time we ask hundreds of thousands of Legit members nationwide to
support someone, it might just be the candidate you suggest.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/letter/suggest_a_candidate/?t=1002&akid=449%2E356062%2EVQqjYG ]Suggest a candidate for LegitPAC to support, and you could see your
fellow Legit members rally around them. Share your suggestion by
Monday, December 11.

I founded LegitPAC to support candidates who will work to bring more
voices into the political process and ultimately help bolster the
legitimacy of our democracy. It’s an important mission, and as we work
to increase the value of people’s voices, I want to hear about it from
members like you.

On December 12, I’m going to sit down with the LegitPAC team and
decide which candidate we should focus on supporting next. We’ll look
at all the suggestions from Legit members, and if yours is in the
pool, we’ll make sure to weigh it.

Whether you suggest someone that wasn’t even on our radar or someone
we all know about, it’s valuable to hear it from you.

So please, submit your suggestion by Monday, December 11 so we can
include your voice as we plan our next round of candidate resources.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/letter/suggest_a_candidate/?t=1003&akid=449%2E356062%2EVQqjYG ]Do you know a champion of legitimacy that LegitPAC members
nationwide should rally around? Share your suggestion with us now.

Sharing your suggestion with us won’t just inform which candidate we
select. It also helps us to elevate the voices of you and your fellow
supporters in our ongoing fight for the legitimacy of America’s
democratic system.

Thanks for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold
LegitPAC

subject: Join Bernie in the fight to replace NAFTA
body:

Friends,
NAFTA helped corporations outsource one million middle-class American jobs and grab $390 million in taxpayer funds by attacking U.S., Mexican and Canadian laws before tribunals of corporate lawyers. The terms of this massive corporate power grab are now being renegotiated, with talks scheduled December 11-16 in Washington, D.C.
Join us on Wednesday, December 13 to hear Senator Bernie Sanders speak out against NAFTA.

11 a.m.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Impeach Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb323d/9e00690/41a6354f/240328c3/2585139447/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_171208_impeac_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em17_171208_impeac_fnd_gq_ful__AG")
Hello,

When I decided to run for Governor of Florida, I decided to do it to stand up for people like my mom and dad -- a school bus driver and a construction worker -- and against people like Donald Trump.

Over the past year, we've witnessed the President's wrongheaded, racist, and sexist policies drive our country from one political crisis to the next. But his behavior with the firing of FBI Director James Comey is a step into grave legal jeopardy.

The President said he _knew_ his National Security Advisor lied to the FBI. So Trump immediately ordered Director Comey to drop the investigation into those lies -- and then fired him after he refused to do so. This is an alarming and clear-cut case of obstruction of justice.

**[So today, with an increasingly clear-cut legal case emerging, I am calling for the impeachment of President Trump. Will you join me? Add your name now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb323d/9e00690/41a6354f/240328c2/2585139447/VEsE/ "https://www.impeachpresidenttrumptoday.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=2+-+So+today+with+an+increasingly+clearcut+l&utm_campaign=em17_171208_impeac_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em17_171208_impeac_fnd_gq_ful__AG")**

Our leaders lose moral standing when they remain silent on difficult subjects. Now is not the time for complicity -- and sadly this is too much of what Floridians have received from Governor Scott and other Republicans. It's time for our leaders to stand up for justice.

This President is wrong for Florida on almost every issue, and as Governor, I will fight against each and every one of his morally corrupt and illegal actions.

Team Gillum will be sharing our effort with Tom Steyer's Need to Impeach -- where millions have already taken action to defend the country against Donald Trump and stand up for working people like my mom and dad.

Now, it's your turn.

**[Add your name now to join me -- and demand that Trump is held accountable for his egregious actions.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb323d/9e00690/41a6354f/240328c5/2585139447/VEsF/ "https://www.impeachpresidenttrumptoday.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+now+to+join+me++and+demand&utm_campaign=em17_171208_impeac_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em17_171208_impeac_fnd_gq_ful__AG")**

Thank you,

Andrew

clean_body: "" Hello, When I decided to run for Governor of Florida, I decided to do it to stand up for people like my mom and dad -- a school bus driver and a construction worker -- and against people like Donald Trump. Over the past year, we've witnessed the President's wrongheaded, racist, and sexist policies drive our country from one political crisis to the next. But his behavior with the firing of FBI Director James Comey is a step into grave legal jeopardy. The President said he knew his National Security Advisor lied to the FBI. So Trump immediately ordered Director Comey to drop the investigation into those lies -- and then fired him after he refused to do so. This is an alarming and clear-cut case of obstruction of justice. "" Our leaders lose moral standing when they remain silent on difficult subjects. Now is not the time for complicity -- and sadly this is too much of what Floridians have received from Governor Scott and other Republicans. It's time for our leaders to stand up for justice. This President is wrong for Florida on almost every issue, and as Governor, I will fight against each and every one of his morally corrupt and illegal actions. Team Gillum will be sharing our effort with Tom Steyer's Need to Impeach -- where millions have already taken action to defend the country against Donald Trump and stand up for working people like my mom and dad. Now, it's your turn. "" Thank you, Andrew "" Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

name: Peter Hanscom
subject: Donnelly for Indiana Strategy Memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
We're glad to have you on Team Donnelly as we fight to keep Joe in the Senate working for Hoosiers. As Joe's Campaign Manager, I wanted to loop you in on a couple of excerpts from the 2018 strategy me |
---

| | Peter,

We're glad to have you on Team Donnelly as we fight to keep Joe in the Senate working for Hoosiers. As Joe's Campaign Manager, I wanted to loop you in on a couple of excerpts from the 2018 strategy memo I just sent around to the team:

**Grassroots Organizing:** "Joe is working for every single Hoosier, and so will his campaign in Indiana. Just like in 2012, we're going to be campaigning for _every_ vote, in _every_ county, and running a people-powered campaign all the way through to Election Day. _No one_ will outwork us."

With the start of the new year, we're going to hit the ground running and open local campaign offices across the state. **But we 're running a grassroots operation that relies on supporters like you, not the Washington special interests, to keep us going. [Will you chip in $5 to help us set up local campaign offices across the state?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c25e9/7377f838/320d5fa4/51fa4d0d/427396796/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-strategymemo?refcode=20171208nd&amount=10")**

**Crisscrossing the State:** "Joe's top priority is to talk to Hoosiers about what matters to them. We want to continue what we started during our RV tour earlier this year and make sure Joe can travel to every county in Indiana again this year to connect with folks and listen to their concerns."

**Our RV isn 't fancy, but all that travel still takes resources. [Can you contribute $5 to help us get Joe back on the road in 2018?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c25e9/7377f838/320d5fa4/51fa4d0d/427396796/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-strategymemo?refcode=20171208nd&amount=10")**

**A Robust Media Plan:** "It's still only 2017, but special interests have already spent millions of dollars on television ads in an attempt to mislead Hoosiers about Joe's record. To fight back, we're creating a robust strategic plan that focuses on correcting the record and telling Joe's story."

Beating back these attacks won't be easy. On top of the out-of-state special interest groups, Mitch McConnell is sure to rev up his allies to spend against Joe after he stood up to Mitch's terrible tax plan. **Dark money groups are likely to spend twenty times as much as they already have on distorting ads before Election Day.[We're going to need help _now_ to have a chance of breaking through and fighting back. Can you chip in $5 to make sure we get Joe's message out?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c25e9/7377f838/320d5fa4/51fa4d0d/427396796/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-strategymemo?refcode=20171208nd&amount=10")**

**Peter, I deeply appreciate everything you 're doing to help Joe keep fighting for Hoosier families.** I'll be sure to keep you updated as we get closer to the election.

Thank you,

Peter Hanscom
Campaign Manager

| ****[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c25e9/7377f838/320d5fa4/51fa4d0c/427396796/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-strategymemo?refcode=20171208nd&amount=25")****

Peter,

Another **FIVE** of our women won their elections on Tuesday!

The winners include four women in Georgia -- Jen Jordan (SD-06), Nikema Williams (SD-39), Bee Nguyen (HD-89), and Keisha Lance Bottoms (Atlanta Mayor) -- along with Wendy Carrillo in California (HD-51).

Tuesday's results bring our total number of wins for 2017 up to 42, and all of them are state and local wins.

This year has shown that when we invest in supporting state and local women -- _especially_ in "off years" and special elections -- they can and do win.

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: Outrageous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
This week the Wisconsin Department of Justice released a report that revealed unaccountable liberal bureaucrats at the Government Accountability Board

Friend, conservatives are being targeted.

And that's not just a talking point. It's not just a political statement. It's a reality for too many of us, including me.

This week the Wisconsin Department of Justice released a report that revealed unaccountable liberal bureaucrats at the Government Accountability Board hacked and collected my emails that go back as far back as 2009! Not just work emails, friend, but even personal emails with my daughter that included private medical information were collected as part of the John Doe witch hunts.

I know I'm not the only one. And I want everyone to hear about this terrible invasion of privacy.

I don’t want this to happen to anyone else, and I didn’t let it.

That’s why, even before I knew I was a target, I authored the law that eliminated the GAB. That’s also why I worked with Governor Walker and my legislative colleagues to reform our John Doe laws.

[**Can you chip in $5 so I can continue to spread the word on this?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a6f300db73ef41fdae36165c55bfbe5c&_e=sLoRGxpM-v2oMR_V3U3YmUh_sjYPFfCslkMKrpuPneZW_K5cpe_4ic8_wui2Y5Q29OX1qUmO_Wk-uxFeV7K8MmpgtrTP5ECLDc8q0fRk6wKFuL6_Oif2-VBrFmPssH8FkWz-Z3-jFqdhz_UcIJmkZehOUrcSc4rasDkfs_wHevzd9CRDTkgn00E7R69xIyhhFPh2vq8xRNlvsUHdryDoCQ1ogbEf_9BGGfc_SOZzeqm81SU5wJxHCKb3JRVsaTtdxRQNAIpcKh0kBFBfUC38_DV_dIWSIWXyP7_syWyKSR-2WdCYLu6wXtb-kkOnV25aqIdyr_8WE8U6cpzLVJUsxU52C6uIdCE2YZBTFRqBr6IjTBKageP0AEdvzDMUmoNe1wuWn-MYb-h0lFGrpSso_4NLQzrVJXz43UaIVGPLhwxE3lwrsBt389IBFdeQ2AzE)

clean_body: This week the Wisconsin Department of Justice released a report that revealed unaccountable liberal bureaucrats at the Government Accountability Board Friend, conservatives are being targeted. And that's not just a talking point. It's not just a political statement. It's a reality for too many of us, including me. This week the Wisconsin Department of Justice released a report that revealed unaccountable liberal bureaucrats at the Government Accountability Board hacked and collected my emails that go back as far back as 2009! Not just work emails, friend, but even personal emails with my daughter that included private medical information were collected as part of the John Doe witch hunts. I know I'm not the only one. And I want everyone to hear about this terrible invasion of privacy. I don’t want this to happen to anyone else, and I didn’t let it. That’s why, even before I knew I was a target, I authored the law that eliminated the GAB. That’s also why I worked with Governor Walker and my legislative colleagues to reform our John Doe laws. Friend, I am horrified to learn how invasive this witch hunt was. It made its way into nearly every part of every major Wisconsin conservative’s life. Our private information was even stored in a file titled “opposition research” -- and you know they wanted to use whatever information they could to destroy us politically. No political motivation justifies this. We have to fight back and continue to spread the word on this major failure of government accountability. Our freedoms are at stake, and you can count on me to stand up for you. Thank you, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Update on the Republican tax plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Friend,

Republicans are inching closer to passing their tax scam. It stinks and will hurt working families. From a rotten process to the special interest giveaways, this is a bill built on the backs of middle class taxpayers.

But this is what we've come to expect from those that have drank the Kool-Aid of trickle-down economics. The theory goes that if we just make life easier on large corporations and their well connected stockholders and fund managers, then someday they will make such fantastic decisions that everyday working Americans will eventually see some benefits too.

Yes, it is as ridiculous and disproven as it sounds.

But their tax bill doesn't even meet that test. If they were just giving away tax breaks to special interests that would be bad enough, but they are raising taxes on working families, gutting Medicare, withholding New Mexico royalty payments, and scrapping future public investments for decades to come to pay for it.

Republicans are asking the country to pay more and accept less in exchange for a Trump economic IOU years down the road. Not only is it a terrible deal, but it's shameful to try and trick our country into buying it.

Rather than their convoluted Trump IOU scheme, we could be investing directly into our communities, supporting working families, and building an economy that truly gives us all an opportunity to get ahead. But Republicans have always hidden behind rising deficits to tell us what we cannot afford. Apparently, the only thing we can afford in their eyes is an additional $1.5 trillion dollars in debt that bankrupts us for decades in order to fund their special interest payoffs.

Would we rather live in a world of special interest payouts and Trump IOU's, or a country where we provide universal early childhood education, have paid family medical leave, offer students free tuition at community colleges and public universities, ensure universal broadband access, rebuild our nation's infrastructure, and take bold actions to fight the opioid epidemic?

We face that choice in the GOP tax bill. There is still time to tell Republicans that we want an actual economy that supports our families and communities, not a hastily scribbled Trump IOU.

I will continue fighting this bill and keep you updated on ways you can stand against it.

Thank you,
Martin

name: Our Revolution
subject: Unity Reform Commission's Meeting in D.C.
body:
#
Friends,
Our Revolution is working to create long-lasting political change. We believe that one of the ways to create this change is to work from within the Democratic Party to create a more open and inclusive party. Our Revolution President Nina Turner, alongside Our Revolution Board Members Jane Kleeb, Larry Cohen, Lucy Flores, and Jim Zogby are focused on transforming the party as members of the Democratic National Committee's Unity Reform Commission.

The DNC's Unity Reform Commission's fifth, and final, meeting will be on Saturday, December 9, here, in Washington D.C.
[**Unity Reform Commission Meeting**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae2a/bed43eb/243f600d/75ff7e7c/4009601490/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/unity-reform-commission-washington-dc-")
Saturday, December 9, 2017
Marriott Wardman Park
Washington, D.C. 20008
RSVP below to join us for the upcoming meeting and show solidarity with Our Revolution's board members and their fight to reform the Democratic Party.
****[rsvp](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae2a/bed43eb/243f600d/75ff7e7c/4009601490/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/unity-reform-commission-washington-dc-")****
We hope to see you there.
In Solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY****WEEKLY NEWSLETTER****FRIDAY, DECEMBER 8TH** **_A Note From Jeanie_** **Dear Derek,**
**On January 3rd the New Hampshire House and Senate will convene and the 2018 session will start. It looks to be just as busy as last session, with nearly 850 bills filed (203 in the Senate, 646 in the House).********With a fiscally responsible budget passed in the last session, I would expect the House and Senate will carefully evaluate bills to assure that they hold true to the spending plan outlined in the budget. ********Thanks to Republican-led tax cuts, business taxes for November totaled $15.1 million, which were $5.6 million above plan and $11.9 million above the prior year. Year-to-Date business tax collections are still above the plan by $11.7 million (6.6%) and $17.4 million (10.1%) above the prior year according to the State of New Hampshire Monthly Revenue Focus report. And, thanks to Republicans, New Hampshire now has a healthy balance in the Rainy Day Fund -- $100 million.********Some of the bills the House is working on include regulatory reform, licensing reform, and clean drinking water. In the Senate, bills include welfare fraud, standards for PFCs in drinking water, and a veterans tax credit. To view the 849 legislative service requests in the House and Senate, [click here](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbT0pW52ma3LTMrghVm-2FI6cVgfmprF84VRq08qM5KuKOCEKbRVRqRRLiBVfMvXk8mCO1YqSDneuJwhVG5dBydtFc-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MKiAeZZX-2BnhgW5hMhlGqZyBylYu9SoQb1OWYf-2BffZmmAPdD-2FUx-2Fs-2BF5SyveSXvXKchYVmGBh5CZsXBit4-2BmirSI7Iv0Y8DHj3etbiTprAJLvdPEX6541CQ4dgyzjGEQsBnxYpGCOGOz3cBN6CJE5igahI-2BoscBBsM0yRZ7cBN20DCLV9eWOC4KvJqG1gyamo0YoEF3QVU-2FknxBOi0CLasIbocTA-2Fa8-2FN-2BhQAdR6KgFG57-2B1B1Q-2FgheuknKqBrtzBNfHkDLh0nOSUj5yrhJcOc2Q-3D-3D).********Also on January 3rd and 4th, the House will be taking up retained bills from 2017. Among the hot topics is SB193, Education Freedom Savings Accounts.********I expect the Democrats will bring great pressure to increase spending in this session. I encourage you get involved and support House and Senate legislators in the upcoming session. Write letters to the editor, testify on bills, reach out to your representative and ask how you can help. When Republicans work together, Republicans win.**

**Sincerely, **
**Jeanie** **Join the Grassroots Circle!**

**The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party.**
**Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. clean_body: nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTYWEEKLY NEWSLETTERFRIDAY, DECEMBER 8TH A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, On January 3rd the New Hampshire House and Senate will convene and the 2018 session will start. It looks to be just as busy as last session, with nearly 850 bills filed (203 in the Senate, 646 in the House).****With a fiscally responsible budget passed in the last session, I would expect the House and Senate will carefully evaluate bills to assure that they hold true to the spending plan outlined in the budget. ****Thanks to Republican-led tax cuts, business taxes for November totaled $15.1 million, which were $5.6 million above plan and $11.9 million above the prior year. Year-to-Date business tax collections are still above the plan by $11.7 million (6.6%) and $17.4 million (10.1%) above the prior year according to the State of New Hampshire Monthly Revenue Focus report. And, thanks to Republicans, New Hampshire now has a healthy balance in the Rainy Day Fund -- $100 million.****Some of the bills the House is working on include regulatory reform, licensing reform, and clean drinking water. In the Senate, bills include welfare fraud, standards for PFCs in drinking water, and a veterans tax credit. To view the 849 legislative service requests in the House and Senate, on January 3rd and 4th, the House will be taking up retained bills from 2017. Among the hot topics is SB193, Education Freedom Savings Accounts.****I expect the Democrats will bring great pressure to increase spending in this session. I encourage you get involved and support House and Senate legislators in the upcoming session. Write letters to the editor, testify on bills, reach out to your representative and ask how you can help. When Republicans work together, Republicans win. | **_Setting Records & Making History_** It’s been a busy year at _**your**_ Indiana Republican Party. This may have been an off-year when it comes to elections, but we haven’t taken a single moment off in our mission to build your state party into one of the strongest in the nation -- and we’re already making history.

As you may have seen in [yesterday’s edition of _Howey Politics Indiana_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1781ece4c2&e=1acd9bb3d6), the Indiana Republican Party, **Governor Eric Holcomb** and **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** have all shattered fundraising records in 2017. _**That record-setting news comes as a new independent poll from the Indiana Realtors shows _Governor Holcomb’s approval rating at 61 percent _**_\-- after just a 106-day campaign and less than one full year in office!

With Team Holcomb, our one-of-a-kind fundraising initiative, the Indiana Republican Party now has more end-of-year cash-on-hand than any year since 2005! On top of that, our balance in the bank at state party is actually double what it was at the end of the last two off-election years (2009 and 2013).

But it’s not just our financial strength that positions us well going into 2018. In 2017, we’ve upgraded our technology – giving us even better data – and already have field staff in place to take our message statewide.

In 2016, we made history with the election of **President Donald Trump** , **Vice President Mike Pence** , **Senator Todd Young** and Governor Eric Holcomb. In 2017, we’re making history with record-breaking fundraising.

And in 2018, together we're going to make history again by defeating **Democrat Joe Donnelly** and re-electing our statewide team of **Secretary of State Connie Lawson** , **Treasurer of State Kelly Mitchell** and **Auditor of State Tera Klutz**.

The ball’s rolling, and with the continued hard work of our full Indiana Republican team, another history-making year in 2018 is within reach!

-Kyle Hupfer

_Photo: Chairman Hupfer and Director of Fundraising Operations**Mindy Colbert** on the cover of Howey Politics Indiana._

| It's officially the holiday season, and this week**Governor Eric Holcomb** joined a capacity standing-room-only crowd at the Indianapolis Downtown GOP's annual Christmas party! Governor Holcomb had a chance to catch up with friends and participate in their toy drive benefiting Toys for Tots.

It's been a busy year for Governor Holcomb, as he has worked with everyone from members of our General Assembly to local officials and business leaders to tackle our state's top issues -- like launching a long-term plan for our roads & bridges and attracting a record number of new Hoosier job commitments!

And with the help of friends like this from across the state, we'll keep this momentum rolling into 2018 -- building Indiana into an ever better place to live, work, play and stay!

| **CONGRESS OF COUNTIES:
You Won't Want to Miss This!**
This week, we announced the official agenda and itinerary for the biennial [Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3f53642b54&e=1acd9bb3d6) training event. For a full breakdown of each session, including session titles, times and speakers, please click [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ea536c2c6b&e=1acd9bb3d6).

This week we also announced that we will be hosting a U.S. Senate straw poll during Congress of Counties! This is the first election-year appearance for Indiana’s U.S. Senate candidates, and will also be the first opportunity to have your voice heard in this highly-anticipated Senate race!
**[Click here to reserve your spot](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f3f662f5ea&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ for Congress of Counties!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=540720a37d&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

| **NEARING THE FINISH LINE:
Passing Simple & Fair Tax Reform**
As Congress is nearing the final steps for passing the first major reform of our nation's tax code in more than thirty years, it's critical that our Republican representatives in Washington know that we've got their back!

[SIGN](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f4b36f7cf8&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ this petition](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b936c88bb&e=1acd9bb3d6) to show your support for making our federal taxes more simple and more fair! Middle-class Hoosiers deserve a tax cut, and we can make it happen. We'll [send these petitions directly to Washington](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e8f39e1188&e=1acd9bb3d6), but it's nearly crunch time, so make sure you show your support now!
